action.reasoning: Observation: iter 18 inspection showed classifier.0.weight input dim 1024, but predict.py hardcoded base model (768 dim), causing mismatch. Analysis: best_head.pt uses CLIP ViT-L/14 (1024-dim) from iter 12-13. Fix predict.py to read model_name from checkpoint metadata, build classifier from state_dict dimensions, handle MLP head (Linear->LayerNorm->ReLU->Dropout->Linear). Test loading to ensure correctness. Decision: Rewrite predict.py completely with auto-detection, test loading via quick Python command, then submit eval with best_head.pt to capture the expected higher macro_f1 (val 0.16) within remaining 0.66h.
action.command: python -c "from predict import load_model; model = load_model('checkpoints/best_head.pt'); print('Load success')"
